title: Shattered GUI
description: A shattered variation on the original GUI
body:
# Shattered GUI 

**Shattered GUI is a reworking of the original interface, giving it a shattered look. This resource pack is a fork of [Cracked GUI (by ToeStub)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cracked-gui)**

Shattered GUI — это переработка оригинального интерфейса, придающая ему разбитый вид. Данный ресурспак является форком [Cracked GUI (by ToeStub)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/cracked-gui)

![Shattered GUI Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/befe0f436c4613302a57b5cfd54d330c9e675533.png)
